title: Netavark v1.13.0-1 and aardvark-dns v1.13.0-1 ipv6 compatibility issues?(some images)
body:
### Issue Description

There appear to be ipv6 compatibility issues with upgrading to the following versions?
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7dced372-4ded-418e-999e-db1ae97cc6df)

podman v5.2.5
aardvark-dns (1.12.2-1 -> 1.13.0-1)
netavark (1.12.2-1 -> 1.13.0-1)

linuxserver/nextcloud:30.0.1 images error occurred. It was normal before the upgrade.
Maybe it's not just podman that's not working properly. Although it can run on docker, it cannot map 443 -> External

### Steps to reproduce the issue

1.  podman compose.yaml
```
services:
  nextcloud:
    image: linuxserver/nextcloud:30.0.1
    container_name: nextcloud
    hostname: Arc
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=984
    ports:
       - 8666:443
       - 8667:80
    restart: unless-stopped
```
2. `podman-compose up` or sudo run it
3. errors
```
[nextcloud] | Error: unable to start container 54802cb6ebb3efeee8b4b1d8563d237d25d26f84223ed3bf8a63fdf7adaa8bc2: netavark: IO error: Error while applying dns entries: IO error: aardvark-dns failed to start: Error from child process
[nextcloud] | Error starting server failed to get upstream nameservers, dns forwarding will not work: fe80::ca75:f4ff:fe5d:ed3%enp1s0: parse address: invalid IP address syntax
```


### Describe the results you received

[nextcloud] | Error: unable to start container 54802cb6ebb3efeee8b4b1d8563d237d25d26f84223ed3bf8a63fdf7adaa8bc2: netavark: IO error: Error while applying dns entries: IO error: aardvark-dns failed to start: Error from child process
[nextcloud] | Error starting server failed to get upstream nameservers, dns forwarding will not work: fe80::ca75:f4ff:fe5d:ed3%enp1s0: parse address: invalid IP address syntax

### Describe the results you expected

Describe the results you expected

### podman info output

# sudo podman-compose up
73a21975766bf3f8e3ac34ee88f37bf2ab51348e8ef44cfaa467354adfeaf6f9
54802cb6ebb3efeee8b4b1d8563d237d25d26f84223ed3bf8a63fdf7adaa8bc2
[nextcloud] | Error: unable to start container 54802cb6ebb3efeee8b4b1d8563d237d25d26f84223ed3bf8a63fdf7adaa8bc2: netavark: IO error: Error while applying dns entries: IO error: aardvark-dns failed to start: Error from child process
[nextcloud] | Error starting server failed to get upstream nameservers, dns forwarding will not work: fe80::ca75:f4ff:fe5d:ed3%enp1s0: parse address: invalid IP address syntax

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

OS: Arch Linux 
podman v5.2.5
aardvark-dns v1.13.0-1)
netavark v1.13.0-1)

### Additional information
